title: Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters
text:
Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

# Michał Nowak

## Senior Vice President, Engineering

Michał runs SmartRecruiters’ engineering function and is responsible for software development, infrastructure, and security.

Michał spent the last 15 years building distributed systems and managing engineering teams in various industries. He joined SmartRecruiter in 2012 as one of the first employees and helped scale the platform to support the needs of some of the largest enterprises in the world.

He is passionate about creating engineering organizations where teams are empowered to deliver business outcomes.

Michal has a Master’s in Computer Science from Jagiellonian University.

title: Jonathan Milne — Author at Lever | Lever
text:
Jonathan Milne — Author at Lever | Lever

JM

# Jonathan Milne

Jonathan Milne is the VP of AI Services at Demand Spring, where he helps B2B marketing teams put smart strategies and automation tools into action—from Marketo to HubSpot to Salesforce. With 20+ years in tech, Jon got his start in HR software at emPerform, giving him a unique perspective on the intersection of marketing, AI, and talent technology. As recognized thought leader, Jon has spoken at top industry events like TiECon Canada, Accelerate OTT, MarketingProfs B2B Forum, and B2B Marketing Exchange. He’s also been named a Top 40 Under 40 honoree by the Ottawa Business Journal and is the founder of the AI for Good Forum, a community initiative helping professionals use AI to grow their careers and make a positive impact.

## Articles by Jonathan

No articles published yet.

# Michał Nowak

## Senior VP, Technik

Michał leitet die technische Abteilung von SmartRecruiters und ist verantwortlich für Softwareentwicklung, Infrastruktur und Sicherheit.

Michał hat die letzten 15 Jahre damit verbracht, verteilte Systeme aufzubauen und Ingenieurteams in verschiedenen Branchen zu leiten. Er kam 2012 als einer der ersten Mitarbeiter zu SmartRecruiter und half bei der Skalierung der Plattform, um die Anforderungen einiger der größten Unternehmen der Welt zu erfüllen.

Seine Leidenschaft ist es, technische Organisationen zu schaffen, in denen Teams befähigt werden, Geschäftsergebnisse zu erzielen.

Michal hat einen Master-Abschluss in Informatik von der Jagiellonen-Universität.

title: Shiran Yaroslavsky | SmartRecruiters
text:
Shiran Yaroslavsky | SmartRecruiters

# Shiran Yaroslavsky

## Senior Vice President, Product

Shiran is the Senior Vice President, Product at SmartRecruiters. With a rich background in product leadership and entrepreneurship in HR Technology, Shiran has a track record of managing large-scale products and cross-functional global teams.

Before joining SmartRecruiters, Shiran held leadership roles at HiBob as VP of Product and was the Chief Executive Officer and Co-Founder of Cassiopeia, a company she successfully led to its acquisition by HiBob.

Recognized for her achievements, she was featured in the 2019 Forbes 30Under30 list. Shiran holds Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees in Law (both Cum Laude) and an MBA from The University of Chicago Booth School of Business.

title: Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters
text:
Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

# Michał Nowak

## Premier vice-président, Ingénierie

Michał dirige la fonction d’ingénierie de SmartRecruiters et est responsable du développement de logiciels, de l’infrastructure et de la sécurité.

Michał a passé les 15 dernières années à construire des systèmes distribués et à gérer des équipes d’ingénieurs dans diverses industries. Il a rejoint SmartRecruiter en 2012 comme l’un des premiers employés et a aidé à faire évoluer la plateforme pour répondre aux besoins de certaines des plus grandes entreprises du monde.

Il est passionné par la création d’organisations d’ingénierie où les équipes sont habilitées à produire des résultats commerciaux.

Michal est titulaire d’une maîtrise en informatique de l’université Jagiellonian.

##### Rebecca Carr

##### Lehua Stonebraker

title: Shiran Yaroslavsky | SmartRecruiters
text:
Shiran Yaroslavsky | SmartRecruiters

# Shiran Yaroslavsky

## Senior VP, Product

Shiran ist Senior Vice President für den Bereich Produkte bei SmartRecruiters. Mit einem umfangreichen Hintergrund in Produktführung und Unternehmertum in der HR-Technologie hat Shiran eine Erfolgsbilanz bei der Verwaltung großer Produkte und funktionsübergreifender globaler Teams.

Bevor sie zu SmartRecruiters kam, war Shiran bei HiBob als VP of Product in leitender Funktion tätig und war Chief Executive Officer und Mitbegründerin von Cassiopeia, einem Unternehmen, das sie erfolgreich bis zu seiner Übernahme durch HiBob führte.

Für ihre Leistungen wurde sie in die Forbes 30Under30-Liste 2019 aufgenommen. Shiran hat einen Bachelor- und einen Master-Abschluss in Jura (beide Cum Laude) und einen MBA von der University of Chicago Booth School of Business.

##### Rebecca Carr

##### Thomas DiDesidero

##### Robert Symons

# Lehua Stonebraker

## Senior Vice President, People

Lehua leads SmartRecruiters global People Team whose mission is to empower every employee to reach their full potential.

Lehua has over 20 years of recruitment, employment brand, HR operations & strategy, M&A, and consulting experience. Lehua has worked for some of the world’s most recognized brands, Gallup, TD Ameritrade, and most recently at Ceridian where she helped the organization successfully enter multiple new markets through 8 acquisitions in 18 months.

Lehua obtained her Bachelor’s in Business Administration, Human Resources Management from the University of Nebraska-Lincoln. Lehua was awarded Talentful’s Top 50 Leaders in Tech and TAtech’s 100 Most Influential Talent Acquisition Thought Leaders in 2022.

title: Ashby One | Influencing the Business with Data | Ashby
text:
Ashby One | Influencing the Business with Data | Ashby

Back to Ashby One: 2025

# Product Fireside Chats: Influencing the Business with Data

Talent Leadership

Runtime: 36 min

May 15, 2025

Join Dan Seifert, Director of Talent Acquisition at Marqeta, as he explores how recruiting teams can use data and reporting to influence their organizations strategically.

## Speakers

Dan Seifert

Senior Director, Talent Acquisition & Experience, Marqeta

Christian Novicki

Customer Success Manager, Ashby

Full transcript

## Recommended Sessions

## Reimagining Headcount Planning as a Head of Talent

40 minThis session explores how talent leaders become strategic drivers of the headcount planning process with a tangible case study from Vanta’s Head of Talent.Talent LeadershipView session

## Avoiding Tech Regret: RFP with Results

12 minChiara Moore breaks down exactly when and how to run a rigorous, stakeholder‑driven RFP. In this talk Chiara covers criteria, scoring, sandbox testing, and pitfalls.RecOpsView session

© 2026 Ashby, Inc.

title: Jaime Perez — Author at Lever | Lever
text:
Jaime Perez — Author at Lever | Lever

JP

# Jaime Perez

Jaime Perez is a seasoned technology executive with over 25 years in the software industry and more than 15 years leading global Technical Support, Customer Service, and Software Development organizations. As Vice President of Customer Support at Employ Inc., he oversees a worldwide team across the US, Canada, and India, driving operational excellence and customer satisfaction through innovative support strategies, AI-driven self-service, and Salesforce Service Cloud integration. Previously, Jaime held multiple leadership roles at MicroStrategy, where he directed global support operations, product development, and quality assurance initiatives. His expertise spans customer experience transformation, churn reduction, and building high-performance teams across geographies. Jaime holds a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science from ITESM and is fluent in English and Spanish.

## Articles by Jaime

No articles published yet.
highlights:
Jaime Perez — Author at Lever | Lever

JP

# Jaime Perez

Jaime Perez is a seasoned technology executive with over 25 years in the software industry and more than 15 years leading global Technical Support, Customer Service, and Software Development organizations. As Vice President of Customer Support at Employ Inc., he oversees a worldwide team across the US, Canada, and India, driving operational excellence and customer satisfaction through innovative support strategies, AI-driven self-service, and Salesforce Service Cloud integration. Previously, Jaime held multiple leadership roles at MicroStrategy, where he directed global support operations, product development, and quality assurance initiatives. His expertise spans customer experience transformation, churn reduction, and building high-performance teams across geographies. Jaime holds a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science from ITESM and is fluent in English and Spanish.

## Articles by Jaime

No articles published yet.

# Bri Fredriksen

Content & Social Media Manager

Bri Fredriksen believes good content must be two things: worth reading (not just skimming) and worth acting on. At Employ, she develops content that helps teams navigate hiring challenges and focus on what works, what's next, and what's possible. Her approach blends thoughtful storytelling with a practical understanding of how people read, learn, and make decisions.

title: Your career site is now agent-ready 🤖 | Teamtailor
text:
Your career site is now agent-ready 🤖 | Teamtailor

May 28, 2026

# Your career site is now agent-ready 🤖

We've upgraded every Teamtailor career site to work seamlessly with AI agents like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and Comet, so candidates can find your jobs wherever they search.

Suzan Dil

More and more candidates are letting AI agents do the searching for them. They ask "find me a marketing job in London" and want their agent to come back with real opportunities. To show up in those answers, your career site needs to speak the agents' language. We've got you covered 🚀

Every Teamtailor career site now supports the latest open standards for the agentic web, including llms.txt, AI-friendly robots.txt rules, sitemaps, link headers, markdown content negotiation, and content signals. You don't need to do anything to enable this.

This means AI agents can discover your open roles, read your content and guide candidates straight to your application form, with no extra setup from you. It's live on all career sites today.

We hope you and your future candidates will like this.

❤️ / The Product Team

Check out some more articles that may be of interest!

### Build custom Analytics reports using AI ✨

### Teamtailor Co-pilot can now edit text your way ✨

### Latest integrations: Powering up your recruitment workflow (Dec 2025 – Mar 2026)

- May 25, 2026Just describe the chart you want, and Co-pilot generates it for you.
- Apr 14, 2026Teamtailor's Co-pilot helps you refine text directly in the Job Editor. Apply quick editing actions, or use custom prompts to tailor your job ads.
- Apr 9, 2026We are thrilled to announce new and powerful integrations that have gone live from December to March!

title: Shiran Yaroslavsky | SmartRecruiters
text:
Shiran Yaroslavsky | SmartRecruiters

# Shiran Yaroslavsky

## Senior Vice President, Product

Shiran est vice-présidente principale des produits chez SmartRecruiters. Forte d’une riche expérience en matière de direction de produits et d’entrepreneuriat dans le domaine des technologies des ressources humaines, Shiran a fait ses preuves dans la gestion de produits à grande échelle et d’équipes mondiales interfonctionnelles.

Avant de rejoindre SmartRecruiters, Shiran a occupé des postes de direction chez HiBob en tant que vice-présidente des produits et a été directrice générale et cofondatrice de Cassiopeia, une entreprise qu’elle a menée avec succès jusqu’à son acquisition par HiBob.

Reconnue pour ses réalisations, elle a figuré sur la liste 2019 des 30 moins de 30 ans de Forbes. Shiran est titulaire d’une licence et d’une maîtrise en droit (toutes deux avec mention) et d’un MBA de la Booth School of Business de l’Université de Chicago.

##### Rebecca Carr

title: Thomas DiDesidero | SmartRecruiters
text:
Thomas DiDesidero | SmartRecruiters

# Thomas DiDesidero

## Chief Financial Officer

Tom’s career is one of building and scaling tech businesses. Most recently, Tom served as CFO for JOOR establishing it as the world’s largest wholesale B2B marketplace processing over $1 billion per month in GMV. Calling on skills centered around rapid change management, he also steered NYRA through a Chapter 11 reorganization securing NYC’s first casino (Resorts World – Queens) – it has since provided more than $4 billion in revenue to NYC’s public schools.

Tom is a board member with the Arthritis Foundation and a mentor for the Villanova University School of Business graduate program.

title: An ATS with AI to Power Your Recruiting | Ashby
text:
An ATS with AI to Power Your Recruiting | Ashby

- ATS
- Sourcing & CRM
- Scheduling
- Analytics
- Responsible AI

### AI at Ashby

# Get better results in less time with AI in Ashby.

Power your recruiting process from sourcing to debriefs with thoughtfully developed AI features across Ashby's All-in-One recruiting platform.

## How we think about AI

## What makes AI in Ashby different?

Ashby’s all-in-one data spans the entire candidate journey, unlocking AI workflows that are not possible in fragmented tech stacks. As we continue expanding our AI capabilities, here are some of our guiding principles.

##### Powered by your all-in-one data

Ashby All-in-One houses all your recruiting data, enabling AI and automation workflows across multiple features.

##### AI that's assistive in nature

AI in Ashby is built to assist you in making better decisions, faster. Not to replace your team's decision-making.

##### Dedicated engineering resources

We ship features quickly, and have a team of dedicated engineers working on unlocking new AI use cases.

##### No gimmicky features

We’re focused on shipping AI-powered tools that solve our customers' top problems.

##### Technology you can rely on

We’re building AI on the most reliable LLMs, with data and security protocols you can trust.

##### Full control over your process

Our AI features always allow you to review, tweak, toggle on/off, and control your process.

##### Optimize your hiring processes

AI-powered features help keep your data clean for better reporting and hiring outcomes.

##### Adopt AI features on day one

We ship out-of-the-box, adoption-ready AI features you can trust to be ready for use across your team.

##### See better results

Ashby customers see a 46% lift in reply rate from AI-powered outreach campaigns.

## ATS

## Reduce the time burden of application review and act on top talent faster

Efficiently review inbound applications, ensure consistency in evaluations across your team, and deliver

title: Dara Brenner — Author at Lever | Lever
text:
Dara Brenner — Author at Lever | Lever

# Dara Brenner

Chief Product Officer, Employ

Dara Brenner is the Chief Product Officer of Employ Inc. who brings more than 25 years of executive leadership experience spanning product vision, business strategy, and organizational excellence. She has a proven track record of delivering customer-centric solutions, guiding companies through transformative growth, and building future-ready operating models. As Chief Product Officer at Employ, she has spearheaded a major evolution of the company’s product portfolio, including the integration of AI capabilities. Under her leadership, Dara set a new standard for HR technology, advancing the product strategy and delivering solutions that redefined how employers and job seekers connect. Dara has held senior leadership positions at ADP, Equifax Workforce Solutions, and Ultimate Software/UKG, where she shaped strategic direction, drove operational advancements, and delivered industry-leading workforce technology. Notably, she founded and scaled ADP’s first Innovation Lab, pioneering the adoption of agile practices that reshaped how teams collaborated and accelerated delivery of forward-looking solutions across the organization. As CEO of Employ, Dara is committed to advancing the company’s mission to reshape the hiring experience. She is passionate about driving product evolution, enabling long-term customer success, and ensuring that Employ continues to lead with innovation, integrity, and impact in the HR technology space.

## Articles by Dara

1 article published

AI & Technology ATS

## From Chaos to Clarity to Connection: How Lever’s Spring 2026 Release Puts the Human Back in Hiring

Learn how Lever’s Spring 2026 release helps you reduce hiring noise, strengthen candidate signal, and focus on real connections.

May 7, 2026

title: Meet the Team | Ashby
text:
Meet the Team | Ashby

## Team

# We're a nimble team of humans working together to do big things.

Ashby is a remote-first company with colleagues working from 24 different countries in North America, South America, Europe, and Asia. We host an annual company-wide gathering, along with individual team meetups each year.

Our 2022 holiday book exchange 🎄

Department

AllLeadershipCustomer SuccessCustomer SupportDataDesignEngineeringMarketingQuality AssuranceSalesFinancePeople and Talent AcquisitionProduct

##### Kaitlyn Crawley

🇺🇸

Engineering

#### Something I'm proud of at Ashby...

I designed and built our HRIS integrations with Rippling and BambooHR. Instead of manually copying data on hired candidates from Ashby to their HRIS, customers can do it with the click of a button!

#### Something I've helped the team with...

I built a script that enabled our team to import our customers' candidate data from CSV files. It's enabled us to work with technology partners and recruiting firms that haven't yet integrated with Ashby.

#### Most surprising thing about Ashby...

The flexibility and breadth of the product was definitely something that surprised me when I joined Ashby. I was impressed by all of the existing capabilities of the product, and I'm excited to help expand and improve on what we've already built!

Show more

##### Benjamin Encz

🇺🇸

Co-founder & CEO

#### Something I'm proud of at Ashby...

I've designed and created some of the early building blocks we use to build new features (think Legos). It's been great to see the team embrace this way of building and watch the building blocks evolve without my help!

#### Something I've helped the team with...

I've built and continue to expand the internal knowledge base of our industry and our customers. It's critical to help the team make independent product and engineering decisions.

#### Most surprising thing about Ashby...

The team has consistently focused on the long term even as I've stepped away

##### Kaitlyn Crawley

🇺🇸

Engineering

#### Something I'm proud of at Ashby...

I designed and built our HRIS integrations with Rippling and BambooHR. Instead of manually copying data on hired candidates from Ashby to their HRIS, customers can do it with the click of a button!

#### Something I've helped the team with...

I built a script that enabled our team to import our customers' candidate data from CSV files. It's enabled us to work with technology partners and recruiting firms that haven't yet integrated with Ashby.

#### Most surprising thing about Ashby...

The flexibility and breadth of the product was definitely something that surprised me when I joined Ashby. I was impressed by all of the existing capabilities of the product, and I'm excited to help expand and improve on what we've already built!

##### Benjamin Encz

🇺🇸

Co-founder & CEO

#### Something I'm proud of at Ashby...

I've designed and created some of the early building blocks we use to build new features (think Legos). It's been great to see the team embrace this way of building and watch the building blocks evolve without my help!

#### Something I've helped the team with...

I've built and continue to expand the internal knowledge base of our industry and our customers. It's critical to help the team make independent product and engineering decisions.

#### Most surprising thing about Ashby...

The team has consistently focused on the long term even as I've stepped away
